D:\CMaKe\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\detector.dir/objects.a
D:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\detector.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\detector.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++.exe -shared -o libdetector.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libdetector.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\detector.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\detector.dir\linklibs.rsp
